name: Cranberry Brew
recipeIngredient: Lemon Peel - from half a lemon, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
Syrup can be made ahead.
Combine cranberry juice, water, sugar, cinnamon stick, cloves, and lemon peel in a large saucepan. Bring to a boil. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Simmer gently for 15 minutes. Strain the syrup.
Combine the syrup with wine and lemon juice; heat until warm, but do not boil.
Serve in preheated mugs with a sprinkling of nutmeg. The syrup can be made ahead, kept refrigerated, and combined with the wine and lemon juice before serving.
Serves 12
